resultList.dtldesc: Luxurious 4 BHK flat for sale in Manbhum Around the Grove, Kondapur, Hyderabad. This spacious apartment offers modern amenities, elegant interiors, and a serene living environment amidst lush greenery. Strategically located near top schools, IT hubs, and shopping centres for a perfect blend of convenience and comfort. Ideal for families seeking an upscale lifestyle in a prime location.::::::::::::Property Specifications:::::::::::::Spread across a carpet area of 2145 sq. ft., this apartment is located on the 10th floor of a 10-floor building, offering breathtaking views and ample natural light.::::::::::::The apartment features 4 generously sized bedrooms, each with an attached western-style bathroom equipped with geyser points, along with an additional powder room for guests. There are 4 balconies, with two attached to the living area, one in the drawing area, and one near the kitchen, providing refreshing views of the park. The spacious living and dining areas are designed to cater to family gatherings and offer a comfortable space for relaxation.::::::::::::The kitchen is equipped with piped gas and has an attached utility area for added convenience. The apartment features vitrified flooring throughout, ensuring durability and easy maintenance. It is also Vaastu compliant and west-facing, designed to bring in positive energy.::::::::::::Facilities: ::::::::::::Residents will enjoy a wide range of modern amenities, including covered parking, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, 100% power backup, and round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance. The complex is well-equipped with 5 elevators for easy access to all floors.::::::::::::For recreation, the community boasts a swimming pool, gymnasium, jogging and strolling track, aerobics room, indoor squash and badminton courts, a kids' play area, and a multipurpose hall. Additionally, a library and business centre are available, offering spaces for both leisure and work.::::::::::::Locality: ::::::::::::Located near 100 trees, the area offers a serene environment while being conveniently close to major landmarks such as Jaya Darshani. Schools, hospitals, malls, supermarkets, and public transport are all within a 1 km radius, with the metro station just 3 km away. Banks and ATMs are also easily accessible, making this flat an ideal choice for families seeking luxury and convenience in a green, well-connected locality.

resultList.dtldesc: Embark on an exceptional journey towards homeownership as we present to you an exclusive offering: a stunning 3 BHK builder floor available for sale in the prestigious Banjara Hills, Hyderabad. Experience the pinnacle of luxury living and indulge in unparalleled elegance in this remarkable property.::::::Property Specification::::::Fully furnished, this builder floor boasts a spacious super area of 1353 sqft. Designed to embrace the principles of Vaastu, this south-facing gem offers a harmonious and positive living environment. The property is located on the 3rd floor of a 4-floor building, providing a sense of exclusivity and privacy.::::::Step inside to discover three well-appointed bedrooms and two bathrooms, one attached to the master bedroom and the other serving as a common bathroom. Both bathrooms feature modern western-style fixtures and are equipped with geysers for hot water availability.::::::The flat also offers the luxury of three balconies, two attached to the bedrooms and one linked to the living area overlooking the road, providing picturesque views and a refreshing ambiance. The living area seamlessly blends with the dining area, creating a spacious and inviting space for gatherings and relaxation.::::::The modular kitchen is designed for efficiency and convenience, while an attached utility area adds practicality to your daily chores. The flooring throughout the flat is adorned with elegant vitrified tiles, enhancing the overall aesthetic appeal.::::::Facilities::::::Residents of this property enjoy several exceptional facilities, including covered parking for their vehicles. The property benefits from 24-hour water supply sourced from both borewell and corporation connections, ensuring uninterrupted water availability.::::::A 100% power backup facility provides assurance of continuous electricity supply. The presence of a security guard and CCTV cameras enhances the safety and security of the residents. Lifts are available for easy access to all floors.::::::Locality::::::The property enjoys a convenient location, with Asha Hospital serving as a nearby landmark. Schools, hospitals, malls, supermarkets, and banks/ATMs are all within a 1 km radius, ensuring easy access to various amenities. Public transport options such as buses and autos are readily available, making commuting a breeze. The railway station is also conveniently located within 500 meters.

resultList.dtldesc: Indulge in a life of pure luxury with this magnificent 3 BHK flat available for sale in Uppal Bhagayath, Uppal, Hyderabad. Boasting a stunning design and top-notch amenities, this property is sure to leave you mesmerized.::::::Property Specifications::::::Nestled on the top floor of a charming 5-story building, this beautiful abode offers breathtaking panoramic views and the ultimate in privacy. With a generous carpet area of 1630 sq ft, it promises a serene and spacious living experience that you’ll love coming home to. Unfurnished and waiting for your personal touch, this stunning flat provides the perfect canvas for your creativity. The expansive living area invites gatherings with friends and family, while the cozy dining area sets the stage for memorable meals together.::::::With 3 spacious bedrooms, there’s ample space for everyone to unwind. The flat also boasts 3 well-appointed bathrooms—2 attached to the bedrooms and 1 common—all featuring modern western-style fixtures and geysers for your comfort. Step out onto one of the 2 balconies—one connected to the master bedroom and the other to the kitchen—both overlooking the road and ensuring excellent ventilation to keep your home fresh. The kitchen is equipped with a convenient piped gas connection and a utility area, making cooking and chores a breeze.::::::Elegant ceramic tile flooring adds a touch of sophistication and durability throughout the space. Plus, the property is Vastu compliant and faces east, considered auspicious for harmony and prosperity.::::::Facilities::::::This flat comes with a range of modern amenities, including covered parking for secure vehicle storage. It offers 24-hour water supply and 100% power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort. Security is prioritized with the presence of a security guard and CCTV surveillance. Two lifts are available for easy access to all floors.::::::Locality::::::Situated just 1 to 2 km from Uppal Metro Station, this flat boasts excellent connectivity, making commuting a breeze. Enjoy the convenience of having schools, hospitals, and malls all within a 1 km radius—everything you need for daily life is right at your doorstep!::::::Public transport options, including buses and autos, are readily available, ensuring you can easily navigate the city. Plus, with nearby banks and ATMs, accessing your finances is hassle-free. For longer journeys, the railway station is conveniently located just 6 to 7 km away.::::::Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity to own a home in one of Hyderabad’s most sought-after neighborhoods—where convenience meets comfort!:: ::
